programme.desc: Archie discovers that a new family is moving to the neighborhood. He goes over to investigate, only to discover that the new family is black. Archie quickly hopes to round the neighborhood up and try to force the family out of the area.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Edith is all excited that she has been chosen for jury duty. When Archie realizes that she may be sequestered, he forbids her to be on the jury, wanting to keep her at home to cook and clean for him. When she is sequestered, Archie fends for himself.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie stays up all night, expecting a phone call from a security guard who has information. It seems his company is laying off and he fears he may lose his job. No one else in the Bunker household can sleep either and it turns into a three ring circus.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Gloria has been reading books on women's lib and encourages Edith to try a little liberation. However, Mike won't take any of her ideas, which leads to huge fight in which Gloria demands that Mike recognize her as an equal partner in their marriage.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie is all set to go to the Mets game; however, Edith has different plans after she accepted an invitation to dinner with the Jeffersons. Archie discovers this and comes up with the excuse that Edith sprained her ankle, thus turns down the invitation.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Mike's artist friend, Szabo, is coming to the Bunker's house. Archie is a bit perplexed for two reasons. First, he is Hungarian. The other is that he sketches models in the nude. Szabo gets a great idea that Gloria should pose in the nude for him.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie is furious with his houseguest, Cousin Oscar. When they were kids, Oscar bullied Archie and now Oscar is taking full advantage of his visit at the Bunkers. Archie wants to throw him out, but Oscar makes an exit of his own when he turns up dead.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Mike and Gloria are all excited about their first wedding anniversary and order take-out as a special dinner. Sitting around the dinner table, an argument ensues which leads to Edith recalling the day Archie met Mike.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: In the 1980s, a serial killer prowled the posh streets of Orange County. Police were unaware of the serial attacks until 1996, when DNA revealed the killer's secret and they linked four murders to a single DNA profile.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: A quarter of a century after the murders of two nurses, Canadian police suspect that a former Toronto cop committed the crimes. A blow to the head of a garbage collector in San Jose leaves strange markings.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: When 25-year-old school teacher Christy Mirack is found murdered in her apartment in 1992, there is no shortage of suspects.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: When 31-year-old real estate appraiser Mike Williams mysteriously vanishes while duck hunting in the Florida swamps in December of 2000, authorities suspect he accidentally drowned. For sixteen years his disappearance remains a mystery.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: After 46 years, LA homicide detectives take a Lover's Lane bandit who also gunned down two police officers into custody. Then, DNA testing helps lead police in Florida to a suspected killer, however, the killer has an identical twin.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: A detective vows not to shave until he solves the murder of a young Oregon woman. It takes three years and a string of Mexican Mafia informants to crack the case and allow the dedicated detective to shave his beard.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: A high school janitor is suspected in the murder of a young girl, but with only circumstantial evidence to go on, police must let the case go cold. And a woman asks the police to reopen the 24-year-old case of her cousin's disappearance.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: Just two years into their marriage, Chuck and Cheryl Hall are torn apart when Chuck finds Cheryl murdered. Though Cheryl's family is certain they know her killer, the law isn't as sure. After several decades, a DNA match erases all doubt.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: When a deadly house fire claims the life of a family in rural Oklahoma, investigators suspect foul play and it sends a mother on a decades-long crusade to find out what happened to her missing teenage daughter and best friend.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: A killer helps convict himself when he boasts about his crime to prison cellmates; and New Hampshire investigators probing the murder of a pregnant woman found raped, strangled, and dumped into her bathtub, get a new lead.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: A murderer's saliva, found on envelopes, helps seal his doom 37 years after his first killing. And Colorado police crack a cold case 24 years later when they take a DNA sample from the victim's son that proves that his father murdered his mother.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: It takes nine years and the work of cutting-edge forensic toxicologists to solve the murder of a medical examiner's wife. Then, a determined Alabama sheriff reopens the case of the deaths of two babies, hoping to get their mother to confess.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: In 1983, Navy seamen Sonny Grotton left base for a long weekend at home. But as he pulled into his driveway, a gunman killed him. And in 1993, former state trooper Doug Wright claimed his estranged wife shot and killed herself in their home.

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Brenda and her man Aaron return after proving that Aaron was a cheater! Now they're here to prove that Aaron didn't father Tammie's baby. Then, Cat will test her boyfriend Tim and his brother Don to find out who her child's father is!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Sean and his girlfriend Lanika deny that he is the father of Rebecca's baby. Then, Kyrstal and Precious want to prove that their brother London did not father Paula's baby. Teen mom Alicia cheated on Tony, but doesn't know if he's the baby's father!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: These denying dads swear there's no way they're the father! These moms need to prove them wrong. The only thing that's missing is the truth! DNA results don't lie, but after the results are read, who will be left looking for more answers?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Today, Maury follows up with prior guests to see what happened when the cameras stopped rolling! Which women left their cheating men? Which controlling men changed their ways? Plus outrageous paternity updates!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Keisha knows that Desmond fathered her baby, but he wants her out of his life! Then, 2 desperate moms confront the man who fathered their 3 kids!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Today on MAURY…Gary comes home with marks on his body, which makes Heather question his fidelity. Then, Ramze's wife says he's giving out discounts in exchange for sexual favors. Plus, Shavon reveals a secret that could end her 7-year relationship!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: One man…four DNA results…is Darren the father? Crystal and Myrissa both have 2-year old kids and claim that Darren's the dad. Later, mothers and grandmothers want to get to the truth about the paternity questions haunting their family.

programme.title: The Maury Show: 2 Women. 3 Babies. Who's the Dad?
programme.desc: Maury will reveal the results of paternity tests on today’s MAURY. Will Maury say “You ARE the father!” and are those the very words the nervous, alleged fathers want to hear?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: After a night of passion with her neighbor, Lashanda claims that Avery is the father, but his girlfriend isn't having it! Plus, Nikki needs to prove that she has never cheated on Daniel or her relationship with her entire family will be on the line!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Has Antonio been cheating on Chasity since their wedding day? Is Mike sleeping with his wife Lisa’s mother? Jackie swears Danny is cheating and he swears she is…Maury’s got all of the results!

programme.title: The Maury Show: Will DNA Prove Andre Is My Baby's Dad?

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En una tarde cálida del verano, en el pueblo de Verona, Wisconsin, se enfrentaba a su primer triple homicidio. Para resolver este caso, los investigadores tuvieron que adentrarse en el mundo de jugadores de alto nivel y apuestas fuera del país.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una niña de doce años reclama que ha sido secuestrada y abusada sexualmente. Ella contó lo que había pasado con voz calma, sin alteraciones ni emociones, lo que hizo difícil que la policía le creyera.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un vecino vio cómo un hombre apuñalaba a su esposa, la empujaba a la piscina y le metía la cabeza bajo el agua.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En la búsqueda del asesino de dos adolescentes de Texas, un perfil de conducta llevó a sospechar de Jason Massey. La ciencia demostró que el perfil era correcto y Massey fue ejecutado mediante inyección letal el 3 de Abril del 2001.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: El mal pie
programme.desc: La policía estaba desconcertada por una huella oscura encontrada en la escena del crimen donde un hombre había sido asesinado y dos adolescentes resultaron gravemente heridas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Rompecabezas de plástico
programme.desc: Un hombre que iba en bicicleta resultó herido de muerte y la policía creía que había sido víctima de un accidente de atropello y fuga.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una mujer joven es apuñalada más de 100 veces. El asesino deja atrás el ADN, pero los investigadores deben jugar al gato y al ratón para obtener el ADN de un sospechoso que coincida.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una bailarina de gogó le dijo a su familia que necesitaba alejarse por un tiempo, y luego simplemente desapareció. Los investigadores sospecharon, porque ella no se llevó ni su auto ni su ropa.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1969, la operadora telefónica de 25 años, Diane Maxwell, es violada y asesinada. Su hermano prometió que averiguaría quién fue el responsable y llevaría al asesino ante la justicia.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Después de que el sospechoso fuera declarado culpable de incendio premeditado y asesinato, mantuvo su inocencia pero fue sentenciado a 25 años de prisión.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando se reporta la desaparición de una estudiante universitaria, la policía cree que su investigación será como muchas otras. Pero cuando descubren salpicaduras de sangre en la habitación de su novio, saben que este caso será diferente.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1971, John List dejó una nota con los cuerpos de su madre, esposa y tres hijos en el salón de baile de su mansión antes de desaparecer por completo. Los detectives deben resolver el caso, a pesar de tener solo una fotografía desactualizada de List.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Mientras estaba de vacaciones en California, Earl Morris se entera de que su esposa ha desaparecido de su casa en Arizona. La búsqueda de Ruby Morris involucra a decenas de investigadores y científicos – incluyendo también a la Guardia Costera.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La víctima había sido agredida sexualmente y apuñalada hasta la muerte en la playa. Se descubrió un par de zapatos de tenis de hombre cerca de su cuerpo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Después de ser admitido en el hospital con una hemorragia inexplicable, Chad Shelton de 11 meses llega a fallecer. Los investigadores y científicos buscan desesperadamente una causa cuando otros de la misma casa se enferman.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Condena por Huella de Palma de Mano
programme.desc: Una investigación sobre un asesinato se ve favorecida por un requisito legal de que los bares tengan cámaras de video instaladas en las instalaciones. Video, cabello y sangre conducen al asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Fue uno de los casos más inusuales en la historia forense. Los investigadores tuvieron que encontrar una manera de resolver un caso de asesinato con una evidencia que consistía en un tomate aplastado encontrado en la escena del crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La víctima había ingerido una gran cantidad de cianuro. Una pista muy improbable: una falla en el sobre de correo, expuso a un asesino que estaba dispuesto a matar a gente inocente.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Ellos pensaron que el incendio cubriría su crimen. Pero una pequeña pista, no más grande que una tachuela, permaneció allí. Contenía toda la información que los investigadores necesitaban para poner a un trío de asesinos a sangre fría tras las rejas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando una bomba casera estalló en una casa rural, la policía no tenía idea de quién era el responsable.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Las vida cambia después de 20 años de haber transcurrido un crimen sin resolver, y lo mismo ocurre con la medicina forense. Hoy en día, un microscopio de alto poder y el perfil de ADN, revelan una pista que nadie había visto antes.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Entre 1985 y 1988, 18 personas fueron asfixiadas, abusadas sexualmente y dadas por muertas en las remotas montañas de California.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una mujer muere mientras paseaba a sus perros por el bosque. Como no tenía enemigos y su marido tiene una coartada, la policía asume que fue un accidente de caza.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El fuego envuelve la casa donde Lori Keidel y sus hermanos se quedaron solos mientras su padre iba a la lavandería. Años después de la desaparición de su madre, Lori le dice a la policía que fue testigo de la muerte de su madre.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Asesinato en el menú
programme.desc: Cuando el jefe de cocina de un restaurante histórico de Filadelfia fue encontrado muerto, los investigadores entrevistaron a los sospechosos habituales: familiares, amigos y compañeros de trabajo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1986, Gary Dale Larson fue asesinado a puñaladas en su casa de Edmond, Oklahoma. El asesino agredió sexualmente a la novia de Larson, Janet Haynes.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Los síntomas parecidos a los de la gripe de una madre y sus hijos resultan ser algo más grave: intoxicación por talio. Después de la muerte de la madre, los investigadores centran su atención en encontrar al asesino.

programme.desc: Dog likes to say, "The apple doesn't fall far from the tree," and this is a hunt where that is true. So will Dog be able to use one family member's troubled ways to catch another one in trouble with the law?

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: While the team tries to handle the bond that newcomer Alysin wrote incorrectly, sparks are flying between Beth and Duane Lee when he questions Beth's decision to go on the hunt without Dog leading the charge!

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Two different young men both have a bad habit of missing their court dates. Looking over their files, Dog senses that they have another trait in common, both are a little too tied to their mothers.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's target today has a history of violence, and apparently plans to re-locate without notifying the proper authorities. Unfortunately the team is missing a key player, Duane Lee is MIA today, distracted by his new lady love.

programme.title: The Dog Rescuers

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Each contestant will be dragged behind a horse. Contestant will enter a elevator shaft and will be covered by approximately 400 rats. One at a time each contestant will sit in the front seat of a car as the car is raised by crane over 100 feet in the air.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant walks the wing of a bi-plane in flight. We fill a plexiglass basin with water, plums, ribbon and garter snakes, and one big albino snake. To jump a car off a two level parking structure with the furthest distance.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: In this stunt one of the contestants will be seated on a platform above the water wearing weighted boots. Laying face down on the floor, contestants' heads are placed in separate medieval looking helmets, filled with snakes and rats.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Joe Rogan, in a crowd of fans, counts down the top 15 stunts from all the shows up till this point.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Players are placed into a large plexiglas coffin with several thousand snakes. Eight glass torch-goblets are placed on stone pillars of varying heights. Contestants will bob in a tank filled with cow eyes to recover pig hearts.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: For this Psycho Arc couples stunt, a hearse will be specially fabricated with a standing platform replacing the rear bumper. One contestant will be handcuffed to a shower inside a bathroom at the Bates Motel.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Two large platforms are hanging below two helicopters. In this pairs stunt, each contestant will be seated in a barber chair. Contestants will each start out straddling the side of a container, at opposite ends, high in the air.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant must exit from a speed boat by grabbing onto ladder that is hanging out of a helicopter. The contestant has to transfer mealworms from a Plexiglas container to a scale. Contestants will launch themselves in a car off a 3 foot high ramp.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants support one another while leaning out over each side of a boat. Each contestant will be lying in a vertical position and rotated head over feet. Each contestant will be in a car and on go will back off the flatbed trucks.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will be standing on opposite skids of the same helicopter. Contestants are hogtied with duct tape on the floor of a meat locker. Contestants will be lying on their backs in a 72-foot-long trough on the roof of a building.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: In this head to head couples stunt the male contestants will be hung by their ankles under individual helicopters. Each team will be in their own massive trough filled with fish guts, squid, and fish scales.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will start on the roof of The Mandalay Bay. A tank is filled with Piranha and pig kidneys, which will need to be picked up off using their mouth. The contestants are allowed to eat up to six cave spiders.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will be placed in a plexiglass cabinet. One person retrieves roaches using only their mouth and transfers it to their partner's mouth, who in turn drops it into another bin. In this stunt, it will be a husband and wife team.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will be standing on a building ledge as a wind and rain storm inhibits their movement. Contestants must bob their heads into a container to retrieve cockroaches with their mouths. Couples will be on their stomachs on a flash flood set.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Tragedy occurs when a Neo-Nazi disputes the Holocaust with the son of a death camp survivor.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark assist a novelist who's given up. Also, they motivate the man's grandson, who has yet to tap into his literary potential.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A reporter uncovers a secret about the past of a woman who runs a home for unwed mothers.

programme.desc: The angels intervene when the lifelong rivalry between two sibling skiers (guest stars David Lascher and Sean Murray) culminates in tragedy. With Roma Downey and Della Reese.

programme.desc: The angels help a young girl with dreams of becoming an Olympic ice skater overcome her criminal past

programme.title: Touched By An Angel

programme.desc: Monica must help a cynical coroner develop a love for life in order to save a little girl whose life is in jeopardy

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Michaela's love for Sully is put to the test when a stranger from her past comes to town.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Loren and Brian plot different courses to prove they're courageous men, until danger unites them.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A dying woman was forced to leave a son behind in the Soviet Union during World War II.

programme.title: Flying Swords Of Dragon Gate
programme.desc: A Ming Dynasty freedom fighter (Jet Li), a female warrior (Zhou Xun) and a corrupt eunuch (Kun Chen) are among those who converge on a remote desert hostel that sits atop a city of treasures.

programme.title: Bulletproof Monk
programme.desc: For many years a mysterious monk with no name (Chow Yun-Fat) has zigzagged the globe to protect an ancient scroll -- a scroll that holds the key to unlimited power. Now the Monk must look for a new scrollkeeper.

programme.title: American Ninja
programme.desc: Michael Dudikoff stars as Joe Armstrong, a one-man fighting machine. Serving in the army to avoid prison, Joe finds himself battling the deadly Black Star Order, as well as corrupt military leaders in order to bring down an illegal arms sale.

programme.title: American Ninja 2: The Confrontation
programme.desc: On a remote Caribbean island, Army Ranger Joe Armstrong saves an old friend from the clutches of "The Lion," an evil super-criminal who has kidnapped a local scientist and mass-produced an army of mutant Ninja warriors.

programme.title: American Ninja 3: Blood Hunt
programme.desc: Martial artist David Bradley takes the reins as Sean Davidson in this third installment of the wildly popular American Ninja franchise, teaming up with Steve James to battle a maniacal terrorist in yet another explosive action-packed adventure!

programme.title: American Ninja 4: The Annihilation
programme.desc: The American Ninja burst onto the screen in the fourth round of martial arts Action.

programme.title: Enter the Ninja
programme.desc: The absorbing martial arts film that exposes Ninjutsu, the lethal, little-known "Art of Invisibility"... which includes the use of hypnotism, explosives, and super-human fighting skills.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: PJ's Steakhouse se está muriendo por la falta de control de la gerencia en la calidad de la comida, con un dueño un poco grosero y su esposo, el copropietario, sentados en el bar bebiendo todo el día.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay hace el viaje a Carlstadt, Nueva Jersey, para visitar Grasshopper Also, un restaurante que ha visto días mejores. Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Viajando al North End de Boston, el chef Ramsay pasa una semana en Davide, un restaurante italiano mal administrado por hermanos enemistados. Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay viaja a Providence, Rhode Island, para visitar DownCity, un restaurante con un avance detenido por un propietario obstinado y de mal genio. Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Mientras está en Bridgeport, Connecticut, el chef Ramsay visita el Café Tavolini. Dos propietarios indiferentes observan cómo su restaurante se va a la ruina . Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay viaja a Sherman Oaks, California, para rescatar a un restaurante francés del peligro mientras los dueños, hermano y hermana, se pelean por el restaurante.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Durante su visita a Los Ángeles, el chef Ramsay se detiene en Capri. Este restaurante italiano está sucio, sirve comida terrible y está desordenado, todo gracias a un par de gemelos muy flojos.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay viaja a Pasadena, California, para poner en forma un restaurante especializado en cocina caribeña. Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Abajo, en Big Easy, el chef Ramsay intenta inyectar algo de vida en un restaurante sureño acosado por una decoración y menús atroces. Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay regresa a algunos de los restaurantes para ver si siguieron su consejo. Los restaurantes que visita incluyen Mojito, The Junction y Bazzini. Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay regresa a Lido di Manhattan, Anna Vincenzo's y Le Bistro para ver si los propietarios han implementado sus cambios. Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: The Secret Garden" es un romántico restaurante francés que está al borde de la quiebra. El chef Ramsay causa revuelo cuando sugiere cambiar la decoración fea, el menú y la cocina sucia.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Lela's es un restaurante exclusivo que desesperadamente necesita más clientela.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Sebastian's prepara comida congelada de un menú complejo y los meseros están más preocupados por las audiciones para sus papeles de actuación que por servir las comidas.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The driver said he couldn't have hit and killed a pedestrian on a Harrisburg street. The Jeep Grand Cherokee he was leasing around that time had been sold months ago to a buyer in another state.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On Halloween night 2004, Adriane Insogna and Leslie Mazzara were brutally murdered in their Napa, California home.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Past Lives
programme.desc: The body of a wealthy American businessman was found in his rental car. Teeth and bone fragments were the only remains. When the victim's wife files an insurance claim for $7 million, investigators seek the help of a renowned forensic anthropologist.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Between 1985 and 1988, 18 people were choked, molested and left for dead in the remote mountains of California. The only witnesses were the insects — and they play an important role in solving the crimes and bringing the killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A man dies in his home after a long history of heart disease. A few weeks after the funeral, rumors surface that the death was no accident.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a decomposed body is found stuffed in a barrel, it's easy to presume murder. But the body had been placed in the barrel 30 years earlier. One of the few clues was an address book found along with the body.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A 19-year-old woman was found dead in her car; the scene had been staged to make murder appear to be suicide. During their investigation, police discovered the victim was involved in a love quadrangle, giving several people a motive to kill her.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In the 1990s, the media dubbed Richard Rogers the "Last Call Killer" because he targeted men in gay bars who were obviously intoxicated.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Digital enhancement of security camera footage shows that what appears to be a casual encounter is actually a forced abduction. When investigators suspect the crimes are not random, they fear a serial killer may be on the loose.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A highway patrolman was dispatched to what he thought would be a routine traffic accident — until he looked in the car. He had seen hundreds of accidents, but none with as much blood as this.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Women in a Louisiana city live in fear of a rapist who leaves no clues to his identity. But technology and behavioral science combine to give police a new forensic tool. Police narrow their search to one man: local policeman Randy Comeaux.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a woman went missing, friends and family were determined to find her. Their worst fears were confirmed weeks later when her body was discovered.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2005, David Castor suffered a slow, agonizing death over a period of days. His wife maintained it was suicide, even though it was done with antifreeze.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2002, a small community in upstate New York was devastated when Patty Wlasiuk died in a truck accident. But burdock seed pods found in her hair and on her clothes indicated that this was no accident — it was cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In the search for the killer of two Texas teenagers, a behavioral profile led to suspect Jason Massey. Hard science proved the profile was correct, and Massey was executed by lethal injection on April 3, 2001.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Doctors cannot pinpoint the source of a businessman's illness.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Order Up
programme.desc: A man is found dead in his home and his ex-wife has a perfect alibi. To determine time of death, investigators need to know when the victim ate his last meal. An endocrinologist, a forensic botanist and a short-order cook answer their question.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When two women from the same town were murdered in the same way, police feared a serial killer was on the loose. At first they thought the victims had nothing in common until they found tiny clues linking them to the same man.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When hunters reported finding a skull in a Texas canyon, police immediately began an investigation. With a forensic artist's reconstruction, police eventually learned the victim's identity. Now all they had to do was find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In this international case of extortion, murder and stolen identities, scam-artist Albert J. Walker assumes the identity of co-worker Ronald Platt. Platt later turns up dead in an ocean with an anchor tied around his torso.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1994, Rhoda Nathan was found murdered in a Cincinnati hotel room. When hotel employee Elwood Jones visited the emergency room with an infected hand, which he said was cut on a dumpster, the doctor recognized the injury as something else.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After 10 bodies turn up in Florida, one victim — 17-year-old Lisa McVey — is abducted but released. She leads police to the perpertrator, Bobbie Joe Long.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When convenience store employee Wanda Mason is found dead, investigators find the entire murder has been caught on the store's security camera. But the image of the killer is so degraded it seems impossible to positively identify him.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Avis Banks and her unborn child were brutally murdered. The body was discovered by her fiancé, Keyon Pittman. When police learned that Pittman was having affairs with other women, he became the prime suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1996, a federal agency ruled that Terri Strickland had intentionally set the fire that killed her 17-month-old son, Josh Hinson. Using the then-emerging resources of the internet, Strickland undertook her own investigation.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a dry cleaner employee is raped and murdered in her store, police turn to forensic science for the answers they need.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A 34-year-old nurse experiences a variety of flu-like symptoms. None of her doctors are able to discover the cause, until she visits her gynecologist for a routine check-up.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: While skeet shooting on a beautiful spring day, Martin Dillon is shot dead. His friend maintains it was a freak accident, but it takes more than 20 years for the truth to surface.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: In 1996, police received a call from Darlie Routier telling them of her two sons' murders. The police found the killer by analyzing blood spatter, doing behavioral profiling and analyzing Darlie's 911 call.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: When Joann Katrinak is found dead in a corn field with her infant son, the obvious suspect is the husband and father of the victims. But insects found on the bodies reveal a vital clue which uncovers a twisted story of passion gone wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: After a Philadelphia Convention, 180 Legionnaires contract pneumonia-like symptoms and 29 of them die. The determination of one scientist helps identify the cause of this deadly disease.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Ghost of Carnegie
programme.desc: TAPS is called out to the Carnegie Library of Homestead, in Pennsylvania to investigate a site that once held violent riots between legendary capitalist, Mr. Carnegie and the steel workers. It is believed that Mr.Carnegie still haunts the library.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Harvesting Murder

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Well of Horror

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Roasts and Ghosts

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Stage Fright

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Murdered Matron

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: The Bloodiest 47 Acres

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Voices of Pain

programme.title: Compañeros de bodas

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mork, who has never heard of Robin Williams and scoffs at the idea of resembling him, gets crushed by mobs of fans who think he is the popular comedian, then has a hilarious nose-to-nose encounter with the famous star.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mork, lonely in Mindy's absence, sets the stage for amazing comical confusion when he gets the visiting Orkan Elder to clone multiple Mindys which he continues to do until he gets it right.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: A small fire in the girls' bedroom becomes the start of a rift between them. Both girls become smitten with one of the handsome firemen that show up. Who will warm his heart and whose hopes will be extinguished?

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: All are baffled by a woman's interest in Squiggy as a boyfriend. He loves her like crazy. She's able to make her every whim his command. Can Squiggy be woken up to see she's only using him?

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: The girls contact a building inspector to help Edna fix all the problems in their building...but Edna's later mad at them. She's got a short time to get up to code or face a huge fine. Will Edna abandon the girls and tenants in her anger?

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Shirley starts seeing an older rich gentleman. His snobby family thinks that she only wants his money and couldn't possibly like him for any other reason. Will they let her prove she's not a 'gold digger' or simply stand on their assumptions?

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: A new male employee at Shotz arouses Laverne's suspicion as she catches him committing corporate espionage. No one, even Shirley, believes her story. Can she get her friend back on her side and foil the plans of "the man in green?

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Laverne and Shirley try to help Fonzie and Richie escape a shotgun wedding by pretending to be their fiances.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: The famished Laverne and Shirley seek outside sources of sustenance when they become counselors at a fat farm and face slim pickings.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: The girls try to effect reconciliation between Lenny and Squiggy after the guys have a terrible argument.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mindy is convinced that she has unleashed the swingingest single ever after she persuades Mork that it would inprove their relationship if each began dating new people and he turns into the hilarious new king of Boulder's social scene.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: When Mindy eats one of Mork's gourmet delights, she turns into a wacky Orkan herself, sending her family reunion into a rollicking tizzy and treating pompous old Uncle Dave (special guest star Jonathan Winters) to a bizarre evening he won't forget.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: The joyous visit by everyone's favorite, Grandma Cora, turns to gloom when she gets mugged in the park, but Mork turns the dastardly deed into a hilarious caper when he and Grandma join forces to even the score.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mork, who doesn't understand why people gossip, reveals some hilarious inside scoops when he shows and tells all about his friends while subbing for Mindy as host of a local TV show called Rumor Has It.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: When Mindy has to work long hours on a new TV call-in show, Mork has to help with the housework. But when his comedic cleaning efforts turn the apartment into a disaster area, he calls up Mindy, on the air, for a new set of instructions.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mr. Bickley's 50th birthday celebration turns into a crazy exchange of everybody's deepest secrets, but Mindy waits until the group leaves to tell Mork somthing she's wanted to say for years.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: Richie, Potsie, and Ralph Malph visit another part of town to meet some girls and find themselves in trouble when the girls' boyfriends show up. Fonzie steps in to save the day.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: For a television show, the Fonz sets a record by jumping his motorcycle over fourteen garbage cans. He ends up crashing into Arnold's chicken stand, and while recuperating from a broken leg, upsets the regimen of the Cunningham household.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: To raise money for the big football game, the boys decide to start their own babysitting service. In Football Frolics, Richie, Potsie and Ralph have their hopes set on seeing the big football game of the year, but tickets can't be found anywhere.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: When Fonzie sets a pigeon coop atop the Cunningham garage and the roof caves, Mr. Cunningham sues to collect damages. In Two Angry Men, Laverne and Shirley prevail upon Fonzie to care for a coop of pigeons.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: After reading too many foreign car manuals, Fonzie is plagued with headaches and is forced to wear glasses for a few weeks, but fears glasses aren't cool.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: The Malachi brothers sabotage Pinky's car the night before the demolition derby.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: A short-tempered sergeant loses his tenuous grasp on discipline when the Fonz reports to the army recruitment center soon after draftees Richie, Ralph and Potsie check in for physicals.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: Personality quirks begin to fray nerves after best friends Richie, Ralph, and Potsie rent an apartment together.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: When Laverne and Shirley pack their bags for a tropical paradise vacation, it turns into a hilarious first-class nightmare as the girls find out the air-conditioner is just a huge hole in the wall and that the swimming pool is only ankle deep.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Shirley makes an outrageous change after a visit to Beatnik Coffeehouse.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Laverne and Shirley seek a time bomb in the electric company office where the girls have gone to protest against their power being cut off.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Much to her mother's dismay, Ashley is staying at Heartland and has promoted herself to VP of guest relations. Ty is still trying to make amends with Amy for his latest relationship snafu.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Jack's patience is tried as Tim recovers from his shooting injury at Heartland. Amy uncovers some surprises about an ex-owner of a horse she's hoping to re-home.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Hollywood starlet Mindy Fanshaw arrives at Heartland under the pretext of honing her non-existent riding skills in anticipation of an upcoming role.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Lisa meddles in Lou's business and personal life with disastrous results. Mackenzie comes back to Heartland to get married, but when a cursed horse also arrives, the wedding is almost called off.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: An oil company begins unwanted exploration on Heartland property, so Lou mobilizes the community against them.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Hoping that Heartland will have a therapeutic effect on two tough kids on probation, Clint Riley books into the dude ranch for a weekend of team building and discipline.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Kit asks Ty to help her re-home a horse that she was given. Lou resurrects the Hudson Derby as a fundraiser event to help Mrs. Bell and others with some county legal problems.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Spartan is stolen and turns up at a horse auction. He is bought by Wes, the man who tried to burn down Fleming's barn. Amy is determined to get Spartan back.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: After a traumatized Spartan refuses to jump, Amy takes him to a man who fixes horses and hearts. Meanwhile, Ty struggles to tame his new horse, Harley, on his own.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Ty and Amy make a trip up to the mountains. But when Ty passes out with a high fever and a blizzard approaches, their remote location is a problem.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: An accident on the highway involving a school bus and a trailer full of horses leads to sudden fame for Amy and a surge of business at Heartland.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Business is booming at Heartland. Amy finds herself caught in the middle of a family crisis when she tries to help a girl and her horse recover from what appears to be a freak accident.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Jack's truck is on its way to rust bucket heaven, forcing him to find the courage to say goodbye to a part of his past.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Amy and Ty spend the night in the haunted Hanley barn, trying to get to the bottom of a mystery.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día seis
programme.desc: Los seis chefs restantes preparan sus platos originales, y los dos equipos diseñan sus menús para la cena de la noche.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Dia siete
programme.desc: Los chefs deben trabajar como equipo por primera vez. El premio de este desafío es un viaje con el chef Ramsay al Red Rock Casino, Resort and Spa.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día ocho
programme.desc: Con solo cuatro chefs restantes, la competencia se vuelve feroz. ¿Quién de ellos tiene lo que se necesita para ser el jefe de cocina del nuevo restaurante de Gordon Ramsay?

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día nueve
programme.desc: Los concursantes prueban el plato estrella del chef Ramsay y se les dan veinte minutos para reproducirlo. Las tensiones aumentan entre los chefs en medio de acusaciones de trampa.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día diez - Parte 1
programme.desc: Luego de una visita sorpresa de familiares, los concursantes restantes deberán diseñar sus propios restaurantes y jerarquías para el servicio final.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día diez - Parte 2
programme.desc: Desde el menú hasta la decoración, los dos finalistas deben demostrar su talento al chef Ramsay, ya que cada uno está a cargo de sus propios restaurantes.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El tiránico Chef Gordon Ramsay regresa por tercer verano para enseñar y torturar a posibles Chefs. El ganador recibirá un trabajo de Chef en el resort Green Valley Ranch de Nevada.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los dos equipos se enfrentan en un desafío de preparación de alimentos que recompensa a los ganadores por la oportunidad de pasar tiempo con el Chef Ramsay fuera de la cocina.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay ordena a los concursantes restantes que preparen el desayuno para los miembros del servicio visitantes. El equipo ganador tendrá tiempo libre y los perdedores tendrán el rol de patrullar la cocina.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: En el cuarto día, los Chefs restantes compiten en una prueba de degustación con los ojos vendados. Los perdedores deben aceptar un castigo difícil mientras los ganadores cenan con el Chef Ramsay.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Para avanzar en este desafío, los siete Chefs restantes deben comprar y preparar la comida para la recepción de una boda.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Melissa se une a los hombres en una competencia para ver qué equipo puede preparar los mejores platos de langosta. Pero hay un problema: los equipos deben matar primero a sus crustáceos.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los seis concursantes restantes deben preparar aperitivos y platos principales con las sobras, por lo que ambos equipos deben crear sus propios menús de cena.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay consolida a los cinco concursantes restantes en un equipo, pero primero deben competir entre sí para impresionar a 100 estudiantes de secundaria.

programme.title: Kitchen Crashers
programme.desc: A kitchen that hasn't been touched since the 1960s gets transformed into a family-friendly space with turquoise cabinets, a white backsplash, retro appliances, and cork flooring.

programme.title: Kitchen Crashers
programme.desc: Alison designs an Italian-style kitchen with rustic features, including a faux beam, espresso-colored cabinets, marbled countertops, textured flooring, and a one-of-a-kind pendant light.

programme.title: Kitchen Crashers
programme.desc: Alison transforms Porsha's builder-grade kitchen into a stylish space with an old-world, Moroccan vibe; Alison brings down a wall to open up the kitchen, then designs a mosaic table and built-in banquette to fill an under-utilized space.

programme.title: Kitchen Crashers
programme.desc: Alison and the crew tackle a small kitchen, transforming it into a sleek, stylish space with accents more commonly seen in big-city lofts.

programme.title: Kitchen Crashers
programme.desc: Alison renovates Fred and Dani's kitchen which has mismatched appliances, dated cabinets and fluorescent lights; she makes it mesh with the rest of their Spanish-style home, removes the cabinetry and opens it up to allow for an island with stools.

programme.title: Kitchen Crashers
programme.desc: In John and Kerry's kitchen, Alison closes off several windows and expands into the butler's pantry to create space.

programme.title: Kitchen Crashers
programme.desc: Alison's crew builds a black walnut table for the dining area in the Blog Cabin kitchen; they build stools for the breakfast bar; finishes include dual-colored cabinetry with under-cabinet lighting, stainless steel appliances and a chef's pantry.

programme.title: Kitchen Crashers
programme.desc: Alison incorporates triple-stacked cabinets in a kitchen with no space to spare.

programme.title: Kitchen Crashers
programme.desc: Alison renovates a kitchen with no sense of flow, starting with the donation of its cabinets and the demolition of two short walls; in addition to a new kitchen island and countertops, Alison creates a small mud cubby and a doggy feeding station.

programme.title: Kitchen Crashers
programme.desc: Tara and Joe love to serve brunch, and they admire the kitchens they see in catalogs; Alison Victoria gives the couple an island perfect for laying out a brunch spread, a built-in banquette, a double oven, floor-to-ceiling cabinetry, and wood floors.

programme.title: Kitchen Crashers
programme.desc: Alison and the crew transform a drab backyard into a multilevel entertaining space; they add a kitchen complete with outdoor cabinets, concrete countertops and appliances; Alison helps the homeowners create custom elements such as concrete planters.

programme.title: Kitchen Crashers
programme.desc: Alison designs a new layout for a choppy kitchen and adds navy and white cabinetry, a butcher-block island top, a muted metallic backsplash, and stainless-steel appliances.

programme.title: Kitchen Crashers
programme.desc: Alison and the crew install new floors, cabinets, countertops, lighting, a picture window, and an orange island in a couple's Chicago kitchen; custom touches include barstools, dimensional shelves and a map-wall treatment.

programme.title: Kitchen Crashers
programme.desc: Toni and Jason are in desperate need of a functional kitchen that fits Jason; Alison changes the kitchen's layout, breaking into a guest bedroom closet to make space for a built-in pantry and closing up a window to add wall space for cabinetry.

programme.title: Kitchen Crashers
programme.desc: Alison and the gang remove some walls to create a gigantic kitchen space, adding new floors, cabinets, countertops, and a rolling bar cart.

programme.title: Kitchen Crashers
programme.desc: After a difficult demolition, Alison and the crew install cabinets, countertops and appliances with mid-century modern style; they also add custom floating shelves and a wine rack made from PVC pipes.

programme.title: Kitchen Crashers
programme.desc: Alex and Joe have a deck on the roof of their garage that goes unused because of its lack of privacy, so Alison starts by enclosing the space with slatted pine walls and designs a kitchen, dining area and lounge.

programme.title: Kitchen Crashers
programme.desc: Alison and the crew design a kitchen for an artistic couple, adding new cabinets in two finishes, white countertops, new appliances, and black paint.

programme.title: Kitchen Crashers

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel acquire a walk-in meat freezer. In an attempt to save money, they order two sides of beef, not realizing this is a tremendous amount. Hundreds of pounds of meat and $483 later, they must figure out a way to unload the beef.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky is the emcee for a television variety show and Lucy wants to appear in one of its commercials. To prove to her husband that she has screen presence, she removes the inner parts of their TV set, gets into it, and does a commercial as he arrives home.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: As a publicity stunt to further Ricky's career, Lucy pretends she's an exotic princess from "Franistan" who has traveled halfway around the world to see Ricky perform. She books a suite at the Waldorf-Astoria and gets a lot of press attention.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: When Lucy screws up a dinner appointment with Ricky's new boss, Mr. Littlefield, and his wife because she is late, Ricky puts her on a strict time schedule. Later Ricky meets with Littlefield to discuss his possible promotion to manager of the club.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky impresses Lucy and the Mertzes with all the answers to a radio quiz show they are enjoying. He doesn't let on that the reason he knows the answers is that he was present at the taping. Lucy is so impressed that she signs him up as a contestant.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky begins wearing a hat around the apartment because he thinks he's going bald. Lucy thinks he's worrying needlessly but goes to a store that specializes in hair restoration in order to help Ricky feel better.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky tries to get a raise from his boss Mr. Littlefield but he is denied. Littlefield hires another act for the Tropicana and Lucy, Ethel and Fred decide to make sure no one shows up for the opening.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Upset at Lucy's irresponsible spending, Ricky suggests she could change her ways if she had a job. Lucy and Ethel propose switching roles with their husbands for a week; they will get jobs if the men stay home to do all the housework.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky and his band are going on a tour and Lucy wants to go too. She dusts off her old saxophone and goes down to the club dressed in a zoot suit to audition for a spot.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos' eleventh wedding anniversary is coming up and Ricky doesn't seem to be picking up the none-too-subtle hints Lucy is giving. She doesn't realize that Ricky has already made plans to buy a string of pearls at a discount from their neighbor.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: After seeing Fred use a pair of trick handcuffs, Lucy uses a similar pair to attach herself to Ricky as gag. She wants him to stay at home and not go to a rehearsal for a live TV show the next day.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel's club must put on an operetta to commemorate its 25th anniversary. However, Lucy, the club treasurer, admits to Ethel that for the past couple of years, she has been mismanaging both the club's budget and her own household budget.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Mertzes and Ricardos feel that their marriages are in a rut and they decide to follow the advice of a book and take a brief vacation from each other. The women move in together as do the guys but they soon all find that they miss each other.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: For the Mertzes' twenty-fifth wedding anniversary, Lucy and Ricky present them with a television set. As they are watching it, Ricky's constant adjustments cause the set to explode. Fred gets even by kicking in the Ricardos' TV set.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel enter a contest for new home furnishings. If they are the lucky winner, they must be home the next day to receive a phone call. Unfortunately Ricky has four tickets to a new musical which he really wants to see.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.desc: After members of her club throw her a baby shower, Lucy realizes that Ricky has become jealous of the attention she and the baby are receiving. She consults with a doctor when Ricky complains about nausea, dizziness, and stomach ache.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: With her baby due any moment, Lucy finds it challenging trying to remain calm given Ricky's nervous behavior. When she asks the Mertzes to come over to offset Ricky, she winds up with three very anxious people.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.desc: Ethel flashes back to the time when she and Lucy raced to win the presidency of their club, the Wednesday Afternoon Fine Arts League. When Ethel was nominated for the position, Lucy bribed another member to nominate her.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En 1980, el FBI comenzó una extensa búsqueda de operación encubierta, de nombre en código "Safebet", que fue diseñada para exponer la infiltración de la mafia de Chicago en los alrededores de los suburbios de la ciudad.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: El robo a un camión blindado en Nueva York en 1981 dejó a un guardia muerto y a otro herido de gravedad. La policía detuvo a unos sospechosos en las cercanías y se produjo otra balacera que costó las vidas de dos oficiales.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En 1997, una serie de crímenes en una pequeña comunidad agrícola de Iowa dejó a los residentes sorprendidos y aterrados.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Chevie y Cheyne Kejoe ganaron la atención nacional después de la grabación de un tiroteo en una cinta con oficiales estatales y locales en Wilmington, Ohio, el 15 de febrero de 1997.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En una tarde de verano en la lujosa Lodi, California, una niña de doce años es secuestrada de su casa. Muchos oficiales de policía y agentes del FBI se reunieron, determinados a encontrar a la pequeña antes de que fuera demasiado tarde.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En octubre de 1995, una familia de Carolina del Sur fue tomada de rehén como parte de un robo de banco bien planificado. La policía local rápidamente identificó a dos de los criminales, pero el autor demostró ser más evasivo.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: El Alabama, un par de criminales condenados escaparon de la custodia de un oficial local y huyeron a lo largo del país. Mientras huían de las autoridades, fueron de estado en estado y desataron una ola de secuestros y robos de autos.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI

programme.desc: The queens must wow the judges (including Halsey and Padma Lakshmi) in a lip-synced dance number inspired by pharmaceutical TV ads, and Andy Cohen and Alyssa Edwards drop by.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens create and star in commercials for new drag-themed dating apps, and rock goddess Courtney Love and actor Nico Tortorella guest judge.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens cook up global warming-friendly looks for the last ball ever, and actresses Tisha Campbell-Martin and Logan Browning drop by to guest judge.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens' improv skills are put to the test for the new talk show 'Bossy Rossy,' hosted by Ross Matthews, and country music icon Shania Twain and actress Carrie Preston guest judge.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens have to produce and host their very own DragCon panels on makeup, hair and body, and Kumail Nanjiani and Emily V. Gordon guest judge.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: With Audra McDonald and Kate Upton as guest judges, the queens impersonate celebrities for the legendary Snatch Game, and Bianca Del Rio and Alex Trebek are special guests.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens pay tribute to one of the greatest stars of all time in 'Cher: The Unauthorized Rusical,' and Andrew Rannells and Billy Eichner guest judge.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: Broad City stars Ilana Glazer and Abbi Jacobson guest judge as the queens are assigned parts in the new hit series 'Breastworld,' and Randy Rainbow and Stephen Colbert drop by.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens give today's hottest social media superstars drag makeovers, and '13 Reasons Why' star Miles Heizer and hip-hop artist Lizzo guest judge.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: With Cheyenne Jackson as a special guest, the queens present two characters on the runway -- their best selves and their evil twins -- and Lena Dunham and Ashanti guest judge.

programme.title: Dinner Beef
programme.desc: Mimi's housewarming party gets way too hot. Karlie tells Joseline a scandalous rumor about Benzino. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: He Said, She Said
programme.desc: Erica tells Scrappy she wants to pump the brakes on their engagement. Traci's issues with Drew erupt when she finds a woman in his apartment. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Episode 5
programme.desc: Joseline takes Stevie's new artist down a peg. Mimi introduces her new man to K.Michelle and Ariane. Rasheeda gets big news from her doctor. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Making A Scene
programme.desc: Rasheeda is shocked at Kirk's reaction when she tells him she's pregnant. K.Michelle and Ariane fight with Mimi's boyfriend. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: N.Y. State of Mind
programme.desc: Mimi and Ariane travel to New York to fix things with K.Michelle. Rasheeda and Kirk worry how the pregnancy will affect their finances. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Come To Daddy
programme.desc: Stevie wants Joseline to apologize, but it might destroy their whole relationship instead. Shay regrets letting Scrappy back into her life. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: The Keymaster
programme.desc: Stevie drives a wedge between Mimi and Nikko. K.Michelle vows to stop brawling when her label tells her she's putting her career in jeopardy. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Episode 10
programme.desc: Scrappy is accused of violating his probation. Mimi has had more than enough of her boyfriend Nikko. Pregnant Rasheeda films a sexy video. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Mistake At The Lake
programme.desc: A weekend at a lake house turns wild and Kirk ends up in hot water. Drew tries to woo Traci. Scrappy makes a difficult choice. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Turnt Up
programme.desc: Rasheeda confronts Kirk over his wild ways. With Scrappy in prison, Ariane auditions to sing back up on K.Michelle's tour. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Up In Flames
programme.desc: Scrappy faces his addiction problems head-on. Joseline makes a surprise purchase. Rasheeda and her mom face off against Kirk. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Boriqua
programme.desc: Joseline surprises Stevie with a gift. Rasheeda makes a decision about Kirk. Scrappy tries to resolve things with Erica before rehab. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Lord Of The Rings
programme.desc: Erica and Momma Dee visit Scrappy. K.Michelle makes a major announcement. Stevie risks it all to get everything he wants from Joseline and Mimi. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Reunion, Part 1
programme.desc: Sparks fly when the ladies reunite. Erica and Scrappy discuss the end of their engagement. Rasheeda confronts Kirk. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: England's Lord Weather provokes Lupin with a bet, and dares him to steal Red Arrow away from him. Lupin takes the challenge as it's a matter of pride, but Jigen wants no part of it because he and Weather are gambling buddies.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Miami Bank is on the verge of bankruptcy after its last customers closed their accounts. The bank manager Garlic devises a plan to revive the bank, and drums up news that his bank had been raided by Lupin; he also asks Lupin to really do it.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Thief brothers Nanja-Monja have been in the business since the days of Arsène Lupin; they decide to induct Lupin as a tourist attraction for the Republic of Karchina. But first they abduct Fujiko.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Fujiko joins Lupin and gang who are camping and cooking Sukiyaki; people are hunting Fujiko, and gunfire is exchanged. Fujiko gets captured and Lupin's Sukiyaki meal gets ruined, but he finds an atomic bomb's detonator plug inside of the Sukiyaki bowl.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Genius prodigy boy Romanoff has ten doctorates from Russia's Public Academy; blustering that no greater than he exists, he challenges Lupin. Since Fujiko is involved, Lupin cannot back down; what will become of this challenge?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Fujiko is the model for Norway's famous sculptor Vingel's crystal mermaid statue; she believed when he said he would give it to her the day it was finished, but Vingel gets greedy and sells it to the mayor of the city of Bergen instead.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin tries to steal a bunch of diamonds from a diamond auction. But the auction auditorium is at the Marine Tower above a skyscraper, and there is only one transparent elevator to get there.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin heads to Mecca to steal Mohammed's treasure. But first he is confronted by Patra Lawrence, the grandaughter of the Lawrence of Arabia, who is the chief of Mecca's special police headquarters; how will Lupin steal the treasure now?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: As usual, Fujiko instigates Lupin and friends to go steal; this time their target is the Jovich Piano installed in a music hall built around it. There is no door large enough in the hall to carry the piano out.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin is after the shipment of raw diamonds that arrived at a harbor in Nice; he sneaks into the storage in the middle of the night but Zenigata was on to him. Lupin escapes with the help of Jigen and Goemon, but Fujiko gets captured.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A month ago, president Gappolini of one of the world's top five trading companies, had died. Gappolini bequeathed a will saying that the heir to the company presidency will be the world's finest sharpshooter and Jigen is a target.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: It's said that immense sums of money confiscated from organized crime get transported to a Swiss bank by ICPO, once a year. Naturally, Lupin wants a piece of that action, so he steals the armed security vehicle along with Zenigata in it.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The city of Grand Hexagon lies at the border of France and Spain; the city is designed with six sides. But at the center of the city is Raika Bank storing fifty tons of gold bullion; an alarm will go off if even one bullion is missing.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Robot soldier Lamda flies above the sky of Tokyo, raids a jewelry store. Its creator, professor Oyamada's daughter Maki and Lupin say that it was just a show to demonstrate the inhumanity of robots.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd TVSP #13: Alcatraz Connection
programme.desc: Master thief Lupin III, gunslinger Jigen and swordmaster Goemon are back for a new caper, this time aboard the casino-ship Machine Gun Kelly. Between the mafia, interpol, and a secret organization based under Alcatraz!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd TVSP #15: Operation: Return the Treasure
programme.desc: Lupin sets his sights on the legendary Trick Diamond, stolen by his late rival Mark Williams. Instead of finding the diamond, Fujiko relays Mark's dying challenge: return all the other treasures he stole to reveal the location of the gem.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd TVSP #16: Swallowtail Tatoo
programme.desc: A mysterious criminal captures Lupin and Fujiko with a very specific order: in order to save Fujiko's life, Lupin must infiltrate a high-security museum and steal the Bull's Eye jewel. One little problem: the jewel is cursed to kill anyone who steals it.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd TVSP #17: Tactics Of Angels
programme.desc: Lupin faces his toughest opponents yet! Four women known as the Bloody Angels are after the strange metallic sphere he stole from Area 51. To get their hands on potential alien technology, they're willing to do anything.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 6/5/22: After being down one run with two outs in the bottom of the 9th inning, Bryson Stott defies the odds and clubs a clutch walk-off three-run home run to right field, completing the miraculous 9-7 comeback win.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 8/21/22: Mark Canha belts a three-run homer in the 7th inning to tie the game, then slugs a two-run go-ahead big fly in the top of the 9th to help the Mets rally for a 10-9 win over the Phillies.

programme.title: All-Century Team
programme.desc: With rare archival footage, exclusive interviews, and compelling stories, the Major League Baseball All-Century Team honors the greatness of these all-time heroes through the awe-filled words of teammates, opponents, and even their own recollections.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/5/12: In what would be Chipper Jones' final game of his career, the Braves took on the Cardinals in the NL Wild Card Game, which was highlighted by a controversial infield fly rule in the 8th inning.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 9/11/22: Michael Harris II slugs his second homer of the game in the 9th, setting the Braves up for a five-run inning and a hopeful victory. However, the stars align for the Mariners as Julio Rodríguez and Eugenio Suárez stage a walk-off win.

programme.title: MST3K: First Spaceship On Venus
programme.desc: A multinational team of astronauts heads to Venus, but finds a world destroyed by nuclear war.

programme.title: MST3K: Teenagers From Outer Space
programme.desc: A group of aliens land on Earth and decide to use the planet as a farm for their livestock. One of the aliens rebels and flees to a small town, where he is pursued by another alien who kills anyone in his path.

programme.title: MST3K: Gamera
programme.desc: A giant mutated turtle wakes from eons of slumber and attacks Japan in Gamera: The Giant Monster (1965). The Bots create their own beauty salon and are treated to a visit from Gamera himself.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: Manhunt In Space
programme.desc: Joel and the Bots watch an early episode of the soap opera behemoth General Hospital, before watching a movie made of several edited television episodes about space pirates.

programme.title: MST3K: Gamera Vs. Barugon
programme.desc: The Mads send the crew another Gamera movie. This time, a group of travelers scour the jungle in search of a giant opal. What they find is actually the egg of a lizard-dog creature called Barugon.

programme.title: MST3K: Gamera Vs. Gaos
programme.desc: Gamera is back and this time he is up against Gaos, a bat-monster with the ability to shoot laser beams. Joel and the Bots make an arts and crafts project.

programme.title: MST3K: Gamera Vs. Guiron
programme.desc: It's Gamera Movie #4, including the Gamera Theme Song and a reenactment of an old favorite magic trick.

programme.title: MST3K: Gamera vs. Jiger
programme.desc: Jonah's crew watch Gamera save the day at Osaka's Expo '70, in GAMERA VS JIGER (1970). Pearl tries to convince Kinga to take a break.

programme.title: Are You The One?
programme.desc: 10 single women are put through an extensive matchmaking process to find 10 guys who are their perfect match. All 20 are living together trying to figure out who is their match. If they do, they'll split a million dollar prize.

programme.title: Are You The One?
programme.desc: Chris T. jeopardizes the $1 million dollar prize with his inability to move on from Shanley. And when Ryan's journals go missing, he finds comfort in Kayla, who is also finding comfort in Wes.

programme.title: Are You The One?
programme.desc: Tensions explode between Jacy and Simone as both girls fight for John's affections. Things heat up when Brittany and Adam take a trip to the Boom-Boom Room. The challenge reveals embarrassing secrets about the girls' old habits.

programme.title: Are You The One?
programme.desc: A challenge invites the guys' exes to dish dirt and spend the evening in the house. Brittany has trouble grasping the obvious message that Adam is not interested. Coleysia and Ashleigh ignite romances of their own.

programme.title: Are You The One?
programme.desc: Tensions between John and Simone reach a boiling point. Kayla's interest in Wes in renewed even though she is still holding onto Ryan. Spirits are raised when a waterfall challenge sends two couples to the Truth Booth.

programme.title: Are You The One?
programme.desc: The house conspires to figure out the next perfect couple. Kayla is called out for playing Ryan and Wes, while Simone tries to break up Chris T and Shanley for good. And a trip to the Truth Booth sends the house into chaos.

programme.title: Are You The One?
programme.desc: The house is left reeling after Paige and Chris T are confirmed as a perfect match and sent to the Honeymoon Suite. Shanley is devastated by being separated from Chris T. And Kayla loses it when Ryan goes to comfort Jessica.

programme.title: Are You The One?
programme.desc: Kayla and Ryan get into a heated argument but the house turns on Kayla when she reveals sensitive information that threatens Amber's relationship with Ethan. A slippery challenge questions some couples ability to hang together.

programme.title: Are You The One?
programme.desc: At the White Party the house lets loose and has fun, but John must come to terms with Jacy's growing feelings for Scali. A beach side challenge forces couples to get down and sandy.

programme.title: Are You The One?
programme.desc: The house tries to figure out how to use their last chances to find their perfect match and win the million dollars. Jacy confronts her feelings for Scali and John, as the house tries to solve the last remaining love triangle.

programme.title: Are You The One?
programme.desc: The 20 cast members reunite with host Ryan Devlin for an intimate discussion of everything that happened in Hawaii. Includes never before seen footage, shocking revelations, and the dirt about which couples are still together.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Back where it all started, the roommates enjoy a night back in their original seaside house, but things get messy when Vinny and Angelina air out old dirty laundry.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Ronnie makes a surprise appearance at Deena's gender reveal party, and later, everyone heads to Atlantic City for Pauly's DJ gig.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: In Atlantic City, the roommates do their best to support Ronnie and Jen's relationship while celebrating at Pauly's birthday gig, and Angelina continues to flirt with Vinny.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex : Caribe (LAS)
programme.desc: Ortega, JV y Mario reciben a Mari A en la playa. De vuelta a casa, JV intenta ligar con Leticia. Ortega acude a una cita con Mari F. En la primera suite principal, la recién llegada Mari A, elige a JV. Leticia, Haexa y Vaski salen a buscar a otro ex.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex : Caribe (LAS)
programme.desc: Let, Haexa y Vaski reciben a Apolo, el ex de Leticia. Vaski es quien toma el pelo a la novata. Ortega se debate entre Camila y Mariana y JV no puede decidirse entre Mari A y Leticia, lo que culmina en una gran bronca tras la Pool Party.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex : Caribe (LAS)
programme.desc: Lua, la ex de Gabriel, llega a la playa. Gab y Angietta queman a JV, pero a Lua no le importa y los dos se enrollan mucho en una cita. Camila y Ortega rompen. La tablet les convoca a un Luau donde llega Julio, el ex novio de Mari A.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex : Caribe (LAS)
programme.desc: Al ver llegar a su ex, Mari A se preocupa por Ortega. Mario y Apolo se pelean por Let. Ortega se derrumba ante la llegada de su ex. La tablet regala la suite a Camila. Let recoge a Gabriel y Ortega y Mariana se ponen al día bajo el edredón.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex : Caribe (LAS)
programme.desc: Bernardo, el ex de Mari F, llega a duras penas y la tableta los enfrenta para lavar sus trapos sucios. La casa se vuelve de nuevo contra Let. Hadad, Bernardo y Julio reciben a otra ex y ella tiene que elegir entre Julio y Hadad.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex : Caribe (LAS)
programme.desc: La Venganza de los Ex: Caribe comienza con una fiesta en un barco en el Caribe. Hadad es el primer ex en llegar. Ortega se divide entre Camila y Mariana. Entre discusión y discusión, los participantes acaban buscando a un nuevo ex.
